title: Occupational Therapy Master Program Activities
content:
Occupational Therapy Master Program Activities

Multidisciplinary meetings are held regularly every week at our university with the aim of supporting scientific developments in the field of health, increasing the sharing of up-to-date information, and strengthening interdisciplinary collaboration. These meetings aim to enhance scientific productivity, strengthen the culture of research, and develop solution-oriented approaches to current health issues by bringing together academics, researchers and healthcare professionals from different disciplines.

Click here

to view the presentations from the regular multidisciplinary meetings focused on Health Sciences held at our university.
